---
title: 8th Handbook Hackathon
date: "2026-07-07"
author:
  - Elisa Rodenburg
  - Jolien Scholten
  - Peter Vos
  - Morgan Taylor Peterson
  - Dania Dukmak
  - Dimitri Unger
  - Irene Martorelli
  - Charlie Greene
categories: ["Handbook","Hackathon"]
---

On July 7, 2026, all authors participated in the eighth hackathon for the Research Support Handbook. For this hackathon, we focused on **Tools documentation**.

## Overview of results


## Hackathon Issues and Pull Requests
